description: Style Note Featuring your little boy's favourite cartoon characters-Mowgli and friends, this pair of sandals from jungle book will be an instant hit. With a grippy outsole and footbed, these sandals offer unparalleled comfort to your little one's feet. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for a hot summer day. Product Details Green sandals with attractive print on upper Lime green ankle straps with branding One piece foamy rubber upper and outsole Nubs on outsole with branding Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteFeaturing your little boy's favourite cartoon characters-Mowgli and friends, this pair of sandals from Jungle Book will be an instant hit.
